roleData.title: Growth & Product Specialist
roleData.description: At Fribl, I drove multichannel prospecting campaigns (Email, LinkedIn), generated 10k+ targeted leads, and built 'Fribl Outbound', an internal prospecting platform (sequences, CRM, unified inbox, A/B testing) end-to-end with TypeScript, Next.js and PostgreSQL.

roleData.title: Product Owner
roleData.description: Led product development at Hexband: designed a complete kit (packaging, QR codes, nutrition guide), built the visual identity, negotiated with suppliers (-15% costs) and improved retention by +20% through customer feedback analysis.

roleData.title: Business Developer
roleData.description: At MyDataMachine, acquired and retained 4 recurring clients, opened a major strategic account in the defense sector, and explored the Spanish market, laying the foundation for international expansion.

roleData.title: Marketing Growth Operator
roleData.description: At Propulse Video, generated €350k in leads (with €200k closed deals), exceeded qualified lead targets by +233%, and increased inbound leads by +50% through SEO optimization and improved acquisition channels.
